summary: Recording of a 'State of Our Union' RSC roundtable event in which Clermont County (Ohio) Sheriff Chris Stratton speaks into a microphone at a panel table (a Rep. Dave Taylor nameplate visible) recounting local crimes attributed to illegal aliens and a plan to partner with ICE and the U.S. Marshals. The frames are static repeated shots of the panelist talking and the audio is spoken testimony.
notable_text: THE STATE OF OUR UNION ROUNDTABLE; RSC; Rep. Dave Taylor
